---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-12"
---

```{r}
# 安装 (首次 5-10 min)
install.packages(c("tigris", "sf"))

# 验证安装
library(tigris)
library(sf)

# 跑
setwd("C:/Thesis/green-borders")
source("tests/verify_il_border_counties.R")
```


```{r}
# Setup
setwd("C:/Thesis/green-borders")
Sys.setenv(CENSUS_API_KEY = "06ccec4c76195625755962fe0462040884f4f1d1")

# Verify prerequisites
stopifnot(
  file.exists("R/00_build_metadata.R"),
  file.exists("data/raw/leaic/35158-0001-Data.rda"),
  length(list.files("data/raw/nibrs", pattern = "\\.rds$")) >= 24
)
cat("Prerequisites OK. Starting pipeline...\n\n")

# Run pipeline
scripts <- c("R/00_build_metadata.R",
             "R/01_nibrs_load.R",
             "R/02_acs.R",
             "R/03_panel.R",
             "R/04_raw_plot.R",
             "R/05_twfe.R",
             "R/06_eventstudy.R",
             "R/07_robust.R")

results <- list()
for (s in scripts) {
  cat("\n========== ", s, " ==========\n")
  t0 <- Sys.time()
  result <- tryCatch({
    source(s)
    "OK"
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("\n!! ERROR:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
    conditionMessage(e)
  })
  results[[s]] <- list(status = result, time = round(as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(), t0, units="secs")), 1))
  cat("  ", results[[s]]$time, "sec --", results[[s]]$status, "\n")
}

cat("\n========== Summary ==========\n")
for (s in names(results)) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-30s %s (%ss)\n", s, results[[s]]$status, results[[s]]$time))
}
```









```{r}
setwd("C:/Thesis/green-borders")
Sys.setenv(CENSUS_API_KEY = "06ccec4c76195625755962fe0462040884f4f1d1")

scripts <- c("R/00_build_metadata.R",
             "R/01_nibrs_load.R",
             "R/02_acs.R",
             "R/03_panel.R",
             "R/04_raw_plot.R",
             "R/05_twfe.R",
             "R/06_eventstudy.R",
             "R/07_robust.R")

for (s in scripts) {
  cat("\n========== ", s, " ==========\n")
  t0 <- Sys.time()
  result <- tryCatch(source(s), error = function(e) {
    cat("\n!! ERROR in", s, ":", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
    NULL
  })
  cat("  ", round(as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(), t0, units="secs")), 1), "sec\n")
}
```


```{r}
setwd("C:/Thesis/green-borders")

# 1. Verify metadata 是不是 TIGER 修正版
cat("\n========== METADATA CHECK ==========\n")
meta <- data.table::fread("data/processed/iowa_county_metadata.csv")
print(meta[, .(n_total = .N, n_border = sum(border)), by = state_name])
cat("Total treated:", sum(meta$border), "(should be 24 if TIGER-fixed; 27 if old)\n\n")

# 2. Baseline DiD results (4 outcomes × 2 specs)
cat("========== TAB1 BASELINE ==========\n")
print(data.table::fread("out/tab1_baseline_coefs.csv"))

# 3. Robustness
cat("\n========== TAB2 ROBUSTNESS ==========\n")
print(data.table::fread("out/tab2_robust_coefs.csv"))

# 4. Event study coefficients (drug only, headline)
cat("\n========== EVENT STUDY (drug) ==========\n")
es <- data.table::fread("out/fig3_eventstudy_coefs.csv")
print(es[outcome == "drug"])

# 5. Panel sanity
cat("\n========== PANEL SANITY ==========\n")
panel <- readRDS("data/processed/panel_county_year.rds")
cat("Total rows:", nrow(panel), "\n")
cat("Treated obs (treat==1):", sum(panel$treat, na.rm = TRUE), 
    "(should be 24*3=72 if TIGER; 27*3=81 if old)\n")
```


```{r}
setwd("C:/Thesis/green-borders")
```


```{r}
meta <- data.table::fread("data/processed/iowa_county_metadata.csv")
```


```{r}
meta[, .(n_total = .N, n_border = sum(border)), by = state_name]
```

```{r}
setwd("C:/Thesis/green-borders")

# 删掉所有缓存中间产物
file.remove(c(
  "data/processed/iowa_county_metadata.csv",
  "data/processed/panel_county_year.rds"
))

Sys.setenv(CENSUS_API_KEY = "06ccec4c76195625755962fe0462040884f4f1d1")

# 重跑(metadata 改了,后面所有依赖它的都要重跑)
source("R/00_build_metadata.R")
source("R/03_panel.R")       # 重建 panel(NIBRS + ACS 不用重跑,interim 不变)
source("R/04_raw_plot.R")
source("R/05_twfe.R")
source("R/06_eventstudy.R")
source("R/07_robust.R")
```
```{r}
install.packages("pdftools")
```
```{r}
install.packages(
  "fwildclusterboot",
  repos = "https://s3alfisc.r-universe.dev"
)

library(fwildclusterboot)
```
```{r}
install.packages("JuliaConnectoR")

library(JuliaConnectoR)
library(fwildclusterboot)
```
```{r}
install.packages("dqrng")

library(dqrng)
library(fwildclusterboot)
```
